broll_generator.veo_clip_duration_note: Veo Lite hard minimum is 4s. We always generate 4s clips and Remotion trims each Sequence down to (audio_duration + 0.05s buffer), capped at MAX_SCENE_SECONDS.

narrator.name: Reassuring Rupert
narrator.speed_rationale: User locked 1.3x 2026-05-14 for punchier shorts pacing

video_structure.scene_duration_note: Each scene runs only as long as its narration audio (plus 50ms buffer). No silent tails ever. Total video varies with topic but typically 14-18 seconds.
video_structure.rationale: User 2026-05-14: max 2s per scene, zero silent gaps, telegram pacing. Audio-driven scene cuts.

fal_concurrency_note: fal.ai blocks parallel jobs from same account with 403. Always run B-roll generation sequentially.
